meta.source: Tikkun API for Tikkun Wheel_June 11 2026_Final again.xlsx

signs.name: Aries
signs.spinSnippet: Your shadow pattern is to avoid self-assertion or confrontation; manifesting as indecision, people-pleasing, or submission to others.
signs.quote: “The work of your lifetime is to stop seeking permission from others and lead with your own fire.”
signs.shadowGilgul:
Your default shadow pattern is in Libra, the South Lunar Node of Aries:

In a previous incarnation your tendency was to keep the peace at your own expense, agreeing when you disagree, softening what should be said plainly, waiting for permission before you move. You learned that harmony is safer than honesty. This pattern can manifest as chronic indecision, resentment, and a habit of disappearing inside relationships; automatically resorting to people-pleasing, over-rationalizing, and passive-aggressive submission.

Your recurring pattern is like Libran scales: where you weigh your words before you speak, or surrender your personal power to keep the peace.
signs.spiritualWorkTikkun:
Your Tikkun is in Aries:

Your spiritual correction is to shift from indecision and codependent compromise to personal sovereignty and direct, independent action. Move from the fear of disappointing others towards taking initiative, honest confrontation, and clear self-direction. You must learn to lead from your own desire and say the difficult thing.

Your life’s work is to stop arbitrating and start choosing. You must take on leadership roles, confront issues immediately as they unfold, and learn that true peace can only be negotiated from a position of inner strength, not fear-based submission. 

The work of your life is activated when you move like the ram: direct, pioneering, and unafraid of the first move.
signs.tikkunLetterFull: ה (Hei)  — the window. Hei is the window — the opening, the breath that starts the conversation. To realize your Tikkun in Aries you must learn to open your mouth: to let your own voice through the gap instead of holding the peace.
signs.dailyMantra: Restrict the urge to please. Claim your voice.

signs.name: Taurus
signs.spinSnippet: Your shadow pattern is the tendency to seek total control over environment or relationships, coupled with anxiety and a fear of vulnerability and betrayal.
signs.quote: “The work of your lifetime is to quiet the internal storm, let life be simple, and let it be enough."
signs.shadowGilgul:
Your default shadow pattern is in Scorpio, the South Lunar Node of Taurus:

In a previous incarnation your soul was driven by a deep fear of vulnerability and betrayal, with a tendency to seek total control over environment and relationships. This pattern can manifest as suspicion of good things, the quiet testing of people who love you, and an inability to rest in comfort that has actually arrived. You may have a habit of watchful anxiety or a need to destroy relationships before they can destroy you. This pattern has a default to drama, keeping you locked in defensive loops where you test those who love you.

Your recurring pattern is like the scorpion: armored, watchful, tail raised before anyone has moved against you.
signs.spiritualWorkTikkun:
Your Tikkun is in Taurus:

Your spiritual correction is to move from suspicion, control, and self-destructive intensity toward steadiness, simple pleasure, and loyalty you don’t have to test. 

You must let yourself be loved without proving it first. Your path is to cultivate stability, patience, and a deep appreciation for the physical beauty of this world without the constant fear of loss. You must restrict the urge to avenge, welcome the constructive pressure of real-world work, and learn to help others out of genuine concern rather than an agenda of control.

The work of your life is to graze like the bull in the meadow: grounded, slow, at ease with what is already here. To know that enough can be enough.
signs.tikkunLetterFull: Vav — the hook. Vav is the hook — the nail that joins one thing to the next, the letter of ‘and.’ To realize your Tikkun in Taurus you must learn to connect without clenching: to hold the good loosely enough that it stays.
signs.dailyMantra: Soften your grip, ground your heart. Trust you will receive good.

signs.name: Gemini
signs.spinSnippet: Your shadow pattern is to miss what is immediately in front of you; struggling to remain present or commit now, in the name of pursuing a higher truth.
signs.quote: “The work of your lifetime is to discover the truth of what is immediately in front of you.”
signs.shadowGilgul:
Your default shadow pattern is in Sagittarius, the South Lunar Node of Gemini:

In a previous incarnation your tendency was to chase what you believed was the truth, and so you struggled to stay present and grounded. Your shadow is opinionated and intellectually arrogant, hiding behind excuses of "having no filter" or being "brutally honest".

It can carry a default habit of running away from emotional discomfort -- ignoring social constraints, and refusing to commit to any deep cause or relationship in the name of truth or personal freedom. 

Your recurring pattern is like the archer on the horse: aimed at the truth far away, but unable to remain in the present.
signs.spiritualWorkTikkun:
Your Tikkun is in Gemini:

Your spiritual correction is to restrict the urge to run and commit to localized, humble communication. Your tikkun is activated when you step down from the high pulpit of dogmatic conviction, and move from sweeping conviction and restlessness toward attention (to the person in front of you, the local issues, the ordinary conversation). You must ask instead of tell. 

You must practice the art of active listening, respect social customs, and use your formidable communicative talents to share knowledge in a structured, cooperative way.

The work of your life is to engage like the Gemini twins in conversation: to be open, curious, adaptive, and willing to learn.
signs.tikkunLetterFull: Zayin — the sword. Zayin is the sword — the blade that cuts and the verb that sustains. To realize your Tikkun in Gemini you must learn to cut away the elsewhere and stay sharp to the one thing in front of you.
signs.dailyMantra: Listen with humility, ask the question, and stay in the room.

signs.name: Cancer
signs.spinSnippet: Your shadow pattern is to seek status or material achievements; with a fear of emotional vulnerability; measuring your worth primarily by what you produce or your title.
signs.quote: “The work of your lifetime is to be loved as you are, not as you achieve.”
signs.shadowGilgul:
Your default shadow pattern is in Capricorn, the South Lunar Node of Cancer:

In a previous incarnation your tendency was to seek respectability: title, status or material achievements, to protect yourself from emotional vulnerability.

Your soul was obsessed with professional victories, public honor, and material respectability. You functioned as a rigid judge of others, taking on excessive responsibilities to mask your deep-seated fear of losing control. This caused you to hide inside a hard shell of isolated competence, measuring your worth solely by what you produce and refusing to show vulnerability.

Your recurring pattern is like the mountain goat lost alone on the cliff: climbing, climbing, but never arriving.
signs.shadowArchetype: The stoic achiever. The one who never rests.
signs.spiritualWorkTikkun:
Your Tikkun is in Cancer:

Your spiritual correction requires you to abandon the illusion that prestige and worldly power are the keys to your happiness. Your life’s work is to come down from the cliff, and move from career-as-identity, control, and lonely competence toward family, intuition, and the unprofitable art of being cared for. You must let yourself need someone.

The work of your life is to descend like the crab on to the warm shore, and to invest your energy in building an authentic, loving home, and learn that true strength lies in the courage to need others and express genuine, uncalculated empathy.
signs.tikkunLetterFull: Chet — the fence. Chet is the fence — the wall that makes an inside, the letter of life and safe shelter. To realize your Tikkun in Cancer you must learn to build a room you can actually live in, and to let yourself be held there.
signs.dailyMantra: Settle into your soft heart, and let yourself need others.

signs.name: Leo
signs.spinSnippet: Your shadow pattern is to live in crowds, causes, or the future. Driven by a fear of abandonment or being hurt, you often struggle to be intimate or present, or forget the people in your life right now.
signs.quote: “The work of your lifetime is to open your heart, and shine your light where you are, for the situations and individuals standing right in front of you.”
signs.shadowGilgul:
Your default shadow pattern is in Aquarius, the South Lunar Node of Leo:

In a previous incarnation your tendency was to live in the cause, in crowds, or in the future — but you forget those who are actually closest to you. You had a fear of abandonment or being hurt, and this pattern can manifest as detachment, and a habit of giving to the many in order to avoid the risk of giving to the present, and achieving your spiritual potential. 

Your soul is weighed down by an Aquarian past life, where you behaved as a highly unique, rule-breaking rebel.

Your recurring pattern is like the water bearer pouring water away into the crowd: being everywhere except here.
signs.shadowArchetype: The visionary. The one who’s never quite here.
signs.spiritualWorkTikkun:
Your Tikkun is in Leo: 

Your spiritual correction is to move from detachment, group identity, and future-thinking toward presence, warmth, and creative expression in front of the real people in your life. You must let yourself be seen as you actually are. 

Your spiritual duty is to use your creative fire of the lion to lead and serve others in a deeply personal, selfless way. 

Your path is to stand like the lion — warm, embodied, willing to be the radiant center of your own life. The work of your life is to shine where you are, not where you imagine.
signs.tikkunLetterFull: Tet  — the hidden good: The letter Tet represents the "hidden good — the small enclosure that holds something precious within. To realize your Tikkun in Leo you must learn to let the good out, and into the warm, particular room you are standing in.
signs.dailyMantra: Show up as yourself with selfless, warm courage.

signs.name: Virgo
signs.spinSnippet: Your shadow pattern is to seek an escape from reality, with a tendency to avoid being practical or paying attention to details; driven by emotional sensitivity or overwhelm.
signs.quote: “The work of your lifetime is to emerge from your fantasies, be practical in the present moment, and live in concrete reality.”
signs.shadowGilgul:
Your default shadow pattern is in Pisces, the South Lunar Node of Virgo:

In a previous incarnation your tendency was passive observation, emotional turmoil, or escaping reality through fantasies or passive dependencies. You absorbed other people’s moods or psychic energy.

This pattern may struggle to be grounded, practical or analytical; can manifest as escapism and passivity; failing to forgive or suppress the things that actually needed to be named and addressed. 

Your recurring pattern is like the fish drifting in the river's current: impressionable, influenced by the external, mistaking sensitivity to the outside world for direction and self-responsibility.
signs.shadowArchetype: The dreamer. The one who absorbs everything.
signs.spiritualWorkTikkun:
Your Tikkun is in Virgo.

Your spiritual correction is to take absolute, practical responsibility for your life, here and now. To move from chaos, escapism, and over-sensitivity toward discernment, discipline, and consistent daily craft. You must do the small thing well and in service of those beyond yourself.

You must do the small thing well, set firm boundaries in your relationships, and use your analytical intellect to serve others without seeking codependent validation or escape.

The work of your life is to tend like the maiden in her garden — focused, methodical, devoted to the work in front of her. Your Tikkun is activated when you apply Virgo’s meticulous precision, self-discipline, and logic to organize your world. To do the small thing well in service of those beyond yourself.
signs.tikkunLetterFull: Yud — the hand. Yud is the hand — the smallest letter, the point where intention becomes a deed. To realize your Tikkun in Virgo you must learn to bring the dream down into a single concrete act of daily service, done well.
signs.dailyMantra: Restrict emotional drift. Ground your feet in the detailed work of the present moment.

signs.name: Libra
signs.spinSnippet: Your shadow pattern is to charge ahead alone, reacting with defensive aggression or impatience. Your tendency is to being stubborn and focused on "being right".
signs.quote: “The work of your lifetime is to lower your horns of combat, yield your need to be right, and to learn the strength of partnership.”
signs.shadowGilgul:
Your default shadow pattern is in Aries the South Lunar Node of Libra:

In a previous incarnation your tendency was to charge ahead alone, reacting with defensive aggression, impatience, and certain you don't need anyone. This can lead to social isolation; a struggle to let others in; and to confuse independence with isolation and burn bridges in the name of integrity. This pattern can manifest as fighting when you should listen, dismissing when you should consult, and "being right" rather than doing the thing that will result in success.

Your recurring pattern is like the ram: You default to a combative, isolated "me-first" attitude, viewing others as an enemy and mistaking stubborn self-reliance for strength.
signs.shadowArchetype: The warrior. The one who tries to push through alone.
signs.spiritualWorkTikkun:
Your Tikkun is in Libra:

Your spiritual correction is to move from impulsiveness, combat, and self-sufficiency toward partnership, fairness, and the soft skill of yielding without disappearing. You must let someone help you. 

Your life’s work is to undergo sacrifice in its most elevated sense: shifting your consciousness from "I" to "we". Your Tikkun is activated when you join a team, master your anger, and use your marriage or relationships as primary crucibles to learn selfless sharing. You must listen to  the opinions of others, slow down your reactive impulses, and learn that real worldly victory comes through cooperation. 

The work of your life is to be like the scales of Libra — balanced, inclusive, attuned to others. You will discover that vulnerability is strength.
signs.tikkunLetterFull: Lamed — The Staff: The letter Lamed represents the "staff" or "goad" of learning. It is the only letter in the Hebrew alphabet that extends above the writing line, linking to the upper world. To realize your Libra correction, you must allow yourself to be directed by another — using relationship, not individual conquest, to lift and lead you upward.
signs.dailyMantra: Restrict the combative urge. Yield your shield, listen deeply, and build the bridge together.

signs.name: Scorpio
signs.spinSnippet: Your shadow pattern is to settle for the comfortable life: the steady job, the safe partner or secure path, driven by insecurity, and a fear of loss or change.
signs.quote: “The work of your lifetime is to move from complacency to overcoming your fears and doing the hard things.”
signs.shadowGilgul:
Your default shadow pattern is in Taurus, the South Lunar Node of Scorpio:

In a previous incarnation your tendency was to settle for the comfortable life: the steady job, the safe partner or secure path. This pattern can manifest as inertia, stubbornness or fear of change or material loss. Your soul operated as Taurus, the bull, which left you with an obsessive attachment to the physical world, stubborn inertia, and a deep fear of change. You spent lifetimes prioritizing sensory pleasures, financial security, and material ownership, choosing empty routines over real spiritual evolution. 

Your recurring pattern is like the bull in the pen: well-fed, immovable, attached to the same patch of ground long past its usefulness.
signs.shadowArchetype: The one who settles. The one who stays too long.
signs.spiritualWorkTikkun:
Your Tikkun is in Scorpio:

Your spiritual correction is to release your fear of change or material loss and step into the transformative fire of Scorpio. Your Tikkun is activated when you allow courage and spontaneity to enter your life and trust the Light to guide you.  

Your Tikkun is to move from comfort, possessiveness, and surface-life, toward depth, honest reckoning with your shadow, and the willingness to lose what you have in order to become who you are. 

You must choose truth over ease. 

The work of your life is to come out of the comfortable meadow and to descend like the scorpion: unafraid of the underworld, of what dies and what transforms, and to find your power in what you are most afraid to face.
signs.tikkunLetterFull: Nun — the fish. Nun is the fish — the soul that moves in deep water, the letter of faithfulness and descent. To realize your Tikkun in Scorpio you must learn to go under, to let the old self die, and to trust what rises.
signs.dailyMantra: Restrict stubborn comfort. Let go of physical control and plunge into the deep current of change.

signs.name: Sagittarius
signs.spinSnippet: Your shadow pattern is a tendency to scatter energy and intellect across many areas and options, finding it difficultly to settle into a single path.
signs.quote: “The work of your lifetime is to stop weighing all the possibilities, and commit your entire heart to a single path.”
signs.shadowGilgul:
Your default shadow pattern is in Gemini, the South Lunar Node of Sagitarius.

In a previous incarnation your tendency was to scatter your energy across many facts, opinions, conversations, and options, but never settling into a single path. This pattern can manifest as analysis in place of action, fence-sitting, and keeping every option open until the options disappear. 

Your soul enters this life carrying the residue of a Gemini past life, where you developed a well-trained intellect but used your cleverness to escape real emotional depth and avoid depth or any real responsibilities. 

Your recurring pattern is like the Gemini twins in endless dialogue: clever, plural, equally able to argue every side. This manifests as a habit of endless debate, keeping every option open until they decay into meaningless noise.
signs.shadowArchetype: The clever one who never quite decides.
signs.spiritualWorkTikkun:
Your Tikkun is in Sagittarius:

Your spiritual correction is to move from fence-sitting towards belief, commitment, and the larger vision. You must choose what you stand for and live by a chosen truth.  

Your Tikkun is activated when you aim like the archer (Keshet) with absolute integrity, loyalty, and sincerity. You must restrict your adventurous, pleasure-seeking ego and take up genuine responsibility for the wisdom you possess.

Your path is to aim like the archer — single-minded, willing to focus on one meaningful target. The work of your life is to find that meaning in something you build.
signs.tikkunLetterFull: Samech —The Support: Samech represents the "support", depicted as a closed, protective circle of light. To achieve your Sagittarius correction, you must close the circle of Samech: stop leaking your energy into endless options and lean on a single, well-chosen truth to hold the shape of your life.
signs.dailyMantra: Pick a truth. Focus on it. Live by it.

signs.name: Capricorn
signs.spinSnippet: Your shadow pattern is to child-like sensitivity and comfortable anxieties; struggling to cut emotional ties, assume responsibility, and take real risks.
signs.quote: “The work of your lifetime is to leave the comfortable shore, and take responsibility for your own steep climb.”
signs.shadowGilgul:
Your default shadow pattern is in Cancer, the South Lunar Node of Capricorn:

In a previous incarnation your tendency was to child-like sensitivity, comfortable anxieties, and defer to the needs of others, especially family. You struggle to cut limiting emotional ties, assume responsibility, and take real risks.

You tended to prioritize the needs of family or others, before your own needs. This created a pattern of codependent comfort and emotional reactivity, where you rely on others for validation, or are trapped by family dynamics or excuses. This pattern can manifest as immaturity or lack of personal discipline, and a tendency not to claim your own direction and take action. 

Your recurring pattern is like the crab: a body hiding inside an anxious shell of excuses, and abdicating your personal authority to others.
signs.shadowArchetype: The one who carries everyone. The dutiful child.
signs.spiritualWorkTikkun:
Your Tikkun is in Capricorn:

Your spiritual correction demands that you develop independent maturity and professional self-sufficiency. Your life’s work is to break free from limiting family ties, take greater risks, and set boundaries. You must move from nurturing and comfort to becoming a provider, leader, and reliable figure for the community. 

Your Tikkun is activated when you leave the soft, regressive comfort of the shoreline and climb the rocky mountain like the sure-footed goat (Gedi). It’s uncomfortable, but you must be steady, sure-footed, and take responsibility for your own ascent. You must restrict your default emotional reactions, set clear boundaries, and assume public leadership.

The work of your life is to leave the safety of the shoreline and climb the mountain.
signs.tikkunLetterFull:
Ayin — the eye.

The letter Ayin represents the "eye" or "vision". It is the spiritual faculty ("ruler") of anger, anxiety and reactivity. To manifest your Capricorn correction, you must master the Ayin: elevate your sight beyond emotional self-absorption, judgment, and fear of lack, and see the world through the eye of spiritual abundance, clear responsibility, and structural opportunity.
signs.dailyMantra: Claim your authority. Take responsibility. Ascend the mountain.

signs.name: Aquarius
signs.spinSnippet: Your shadow pattern is to seek constant admiration, personal glory, and a spotlight for accomplishments, driven by insecurity and the need to be seen.
signs.quote: “The work of your lifetime is to come down from the isolated throne of your ego, and share your gifts and light with others".
signs.shadowGilgul:
Your default shadow pattern is in Leo, the South Lunar Node of Aquarius:

Your default shadow is to become trapped in egocentric vanity, demanding constant admiration, personal glory, and a spotlight for your accomplishments. 

Your soul entered this world carrying the heavy, pride-filled default settings of a Leo past life, where you ruled over your subjects and lived solely primarily for personal honor and luxury. You carried an instinctive habit of manipulating others to feed your massive ego, confusing dramatic self-aggrandizement with authentic leadership.

In a previous incarnation your tendency was to need to lead, to be admired, to make the story about your part in it. Your default pattern can confuse leadership with being seen and shine for yourself before you shine for others. This pattern can manifest as performance, a hunger for recognition, and warmth that doesn’t last because it was spent on applause. 

Your recurring pattern is like the lion holding court: magnetic, central, waiting to admired, but needing to give generously.
signs.shadowArchetype: The king, the performer. The one who needs the room.
signs.spiritualWorkTikkun:
Your Tikkun is in Aquarius:

Your spiritual correction demands that you transition from "me" to "we," trading your crown for equal partnership. You must silence your ego, accept others as equals, and commit to genuine service. 

Your Tikkun is to move from ego, applause, and the need to be central, toward humility, friendship as equals, and service to the group. You must contribute without needing the credit.

The work of your life is to give like the water bearer: pouring out abundance, wisdom, and generosity to others without keeping score or demanding personal credit.
signs.tikkunLetterFull: Tzadik — the fishhook. Tzadi is the fishhook — the line that draws up from the depths, the letter of the righteous and the sincere. To realize your Tikkun in Aquarius you must learn to draw your gift up out of the spotlight and into quiet service.
signs.dailyMantra: Restrict the need for applause. Step down from the throne, and serve others.

signs.name: Pisces
signs.spinSnippet: Your shadow pattern is to obsess over minor details, fix compulsively, and shield away from genuine emotional involvement; because imperfection feels deeply uncomfortable.
signs.quote: “The work of your lifetime is to trust what cannot be measured.”
signs.shadowGilgul:
Your default shadow pattern is in Virgo, the South Lunar Node of Pisces: 

Your soul carries the residual rigidity, worry, and hyper-logical criticism of a Virgo past life. Lifetimes spent focusing on microscopic physical details have left you with a tendency to obsess over minor details (to fix, to tidy, to make the world add up before you let yourself rest). You use a critical perfectionism to shield yourself from genuine emotional involvement.  This pattern can manifest as anxiety, over-analysis, and missing the music. Your tikkun demands that you surrender your rigid need for control, look beyond the physical world, and step into the boundless, non-judgmental compassion of Pisces. This Virgo South Node manifests in this lifetime as an anxious, obsessive need to tidy, organize, and correct the world before you allow yourself to feel or trust.

Your recurring pattern is like the flawless self-reliant maiden: she anxiously analyzes details and feels a to compulsively fix, critique, or micromanage because imperfection feels deeply uncomfortable.
signs.shadowArchetype: The meticulous fixer. The one who never quite relaxes.
signs.spiritualWorkTikkun:
Your Tikkun is in Pisces: 

Your spiritual correction is to recognize that the physical world of your five senses (Malchut) is merely a limited fraction of reality, and that ultimate truth is beyond human logic. 

Your Tikkun is activated when you swim like the two fishes, connected simultaneously to both physical structure and the boundless sea of spiritual consciousness. You must trust what you cannot prove, towards greater sharing and openness, and moving away from hyper-independence and self-reliance.

The work of your life is to come out of the perfect garden rows and into the sea. Move from perfectionism, judgement, and the need to make everything add up toward feeling, faith, and creative surrender.
signs.tikkunLetterFull:
Kuf (ק) — The Needle's Eye: 

The letter Kuf created the constellation of Pisces and represents the "eye of the needle" or the narrow threshold between the holy and the unseen. It is the only letter in the Hebrew alphabet that extends below the writing line to redeem fallen sparks of light. To manifest your Pisces correction, you must learn to pass through the small Kuf: squeezing your analytical ego through the narrow opening, to stop measuring, and let yourself be present to what cannot be measured.
signs.dailyMantra: Restrict the critical judgment. Surrender the spreadsheet, and let yourself feel and float.
